skills.title: BLAZING EDGE
skills.desc: DEALS DAMAGE EQUAL TO 100% OF ATK TO THE SELECTED ENEMY

skills.title: INFERNO ACCUMULATION
skills.desc: GRANTS 10% ATK BOOST AND 20% CRIT RATE BOOST TO SELF

skills.title: FOLLOW UP
skills.desc: GRANTS 2 STACKS OF COUNTER-ATTACK TO SELF (-1 STACK AFTER EACH TRIGGER)

skills.title: HELL'S PARADISE
skills.desc: DEALS DAMAGE EQUAL TO 190% OF ATK TO THE SELECTED ENEMY, AND 70% OF ATK TO THE NEARBY ENEMIES
